package repository

import "context"

// SessionsRepository is a draft repository boundary for sessions.
// Keep runtime implementations behind platform repository ports before copying this draft.
type SessionsRepository interface {
	List(ctx context.Context, query SessionsQuery) ([]Session, error)
}

type SessionsQuery struct {
	Keywords []string
	Page int
	PageSize int
}
